summary: Frontend testing of 14 new features for Yrvante website. All features PASSED: Exit-Intent popup with YRVA10 discount code, Package Quiz (5 questions + recommendation), Live Examples (industry/tier/view switching), Before & After slider, Competitor Comparison table, Trust Badges (4 badges), Calculator discount code YRVA10 (10% off), Calculator URL params (?package=basic&code=YRVA10), Dark mode toggle, and glassmorphism Calculator CTA banner.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: Homepage loads correctly with all new sections visible
2. PASS: Trust Badges section shows 4 badges (KVK Geregistreerd, 100% Tevredenheid, Reactie < 2 uur, Op Maat Gemaakt)
3. PASS: Calculator CTA banner has glassmorphism styling (bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl) - NOT dark navy
4. PASS: Package Quiz - start quiz button visible, 5 questions work, recommendation shown with CTA to calculator
5. PASS: Package Quiz result links to /calculator?package=rebranding (pre-selects package)
6. PASS: Live Examples section - industry switching (Kapper, Loodgieter, Coach, Restaurant) works
7. PASS: Live Examples section - tier switching (Basis, Pro, Premium) works
8. PASS: Live Examples section - view mode switching (desktop/mobile) works
9. PASS: Before & After slider visible with draggable slider between old and new website mockup
10. PASS: Competitor Comparison table shows Groot bureau vs Yrvante vs Goedkope freelancer
11. PASS: Calculator page loads at /calculator with all 4 packages visible (rebranding, basic, pro, premium)
12. PASS: Calculator discount code YRVA10 applies 10% discount (€500 -> €450 for Basic)
13. PASS: Calculator URL params /calculator?code=YRVA10&package=basic pre-selects Basic and applies discount
14. PASS: Exit-Intent popup appears after 5 seconds when mouse leaves top of viewport
15. PASS: Exit-Intent popup displays YRVA10 discount code with CTA to calculator
16. PASS: Dark mode toggle works - html gets 'dark' class, all sections render correctly in dark mode
critical_code_review_comments: All new components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
ExitIntentPopup.jsx: Uses localStorage to prevent showing again for 24h - good UX
PackageQuiz.jsx: Scoring algorithm correctly recommends packages based on answers
CalculatorPage.jsx: URL params (package, code) correctly parsed and applied on load
Calculator CTA banner uses glassmorphism (bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl) - design requirement met
All sections have proper section numbers: (10) Quiz, (11) Before/After, (12) Live Examples, (13) Competitor Comparison
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23: All 14 new features tested and working. Exit-Intent popup triggers after 5 seconds when mouse leaves viewport top, shows YRVA10 code. Package Quiz has 5 questions and recommends packages. Live Examples allows switching industries (Kapper, Loodgieter, Coach, Restaurant), tiers (Basis, Pro, Premium), and view modes (desktop/mobile). Before/After slider shows old vs new website mockup. Competitor Comparison shows 3 columns. Calculator accepts URL params ?package=X&code=YRVA10. Dark mode toggle works. Calculator CTA banner is glassmorphism (not dark navy). Trust Badges show 4 badges.
